violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw ground beef was stored above whole muscle beef in walk in cooler.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -2 door prep cooler at 42-45F.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Gas stove is not under vent hood. Also need to install a filter on vent hood.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet rooms were not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor tiles in back corridor have some cracks.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Paint wall by ice maker, paint ceiling in kitchen.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop sitting in bucket. -Install splash shield between utility sink and prep table.
